message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>The sensitivity of SARS-CoV-2 RT-PCR tests developed by Charité (Germany), HKU (Hong-Kong), China CDC (China), US CDC (United-States), and Institut Pasteur, Paris (France) was assessed on SARS-CoV-2 cell culture supernatants and clinical samples. Although all RT-PCR assays performed well for SARS-CoV-2 detection, RdRp Institut Pasteur (IP2, IP4), N China CDC, and N1 US CDC were found to be the most sensitive.</jats:p>
title: Sensitivity assessment of SARS-CoV-2 PCR assays developed by WHO referral laboratories
